title: StarCore
description: A plugin library that contains a collection of other Java Only libraries of mine and some Spigot specific things
body:
**This plugin is mostly intended for plugin developers, there is little in terms of features and even those features require supporting plugins to use them**

# Incompatible Plugins
[StarMCLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/starmclib.129505/) - StarCore already provides StarMCLib and is not needed to be installed as a plugin  
[StarEvents](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/starevents.129498/) - StarCore already provides StarEvents and is not needed to be installed as a plugin  
[StarItems](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/staritems.116413/) - StarCore already provides StarItems and is not needed to be installed as a plugin

# Dependencies
Java 21  
[NBTAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi)

# Basic Information 
StarCore is a library plugin that has common frameworks and utilities shared amongst StarDevLLC plugins

# Installation
[View the Installation Guide on the Wiki](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarCore/wiki)

# How to use
The [Official Wiki](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarCore/wiki) has pages on how to use different aspects of this plugin. This is kept up-to-date as updates pass

*This plugin is provided free of charge and under the MIT Open Source License. I will never sell this library anywhere. If you see it being sold, it is not by me and please report any of these cases to me directly. You can find [links to the Official Releases on the GitHub README file](https://github.com/StarDevelopmentLLC/StarCore/blob/main/README.md).*
